scripts.help:
echo '
splint_geo_processor scripts
============================
  npm run dev                         Start processor polling loop (local)
  npm run dev:prod                    Start processor polling loop (production)
  npm run build                       Compile TypeScript to dist/
  npm run start                       Run compiled JS (local)
  npm run start:prod                  Run compiled JS (production)

  npm run inspect -- <id>             Fetch job by objectID/UUID, write inbox JSON,
                                      launch Rhino+Grasshopper for manual debugging (local)
  npm run inspect:prod -- <id>        Same as inspect, using production API

  npm run capture -- <id>             Fetch job, save as test fixture, run pipeline,
                                      write .result.json (and .benchmark.json on first success) (local)
  npm run capture:prod -- <id>        Same as capture, using production API

  npm run test:generators             Run all test-fixtures/*.fixture.json through the pipeline,
                                      compare against benchmarks, report pass/fail
  npm run test:generators -- <id>     Run a single fixture by name (e.g. JWA3)
'
